market_pulse: EDC Week dominates Las Vegas nightlife with heavy talent deployments; LIV Nightclub leading with multi-day residencies while competitors focus on premium talent drops and seasonal beach club rotations.

content_gaps.description: Multi-day artist residencies (B2B sets, extended runs) are gaining traction across LIV, OMNIA, and Zouk. LIV is effectively leveraging Josh Baker B2B Kettama B2B Prospa format.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Expand residency content strategy with behind-the-scenes artist prep content and countdown posts for multi-day bookings

content_gaps.description: Sommer Ray and other high-profile creators are actively promoting beach clubs with guest appearances and outfit content; LIV Beach has captured this but could expand macro-influencer partnerships.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Negotiate 2-3 macro-influencer appearances per week for LIV Beach during peak season; focus on outfit/lifestyle TikTok creators

content_gaps.description: Zouk and Encore are using animated stories and countdown content for EDC week events; most venues lack cohesive narrative threading.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Deploy daily countdown stories, artist spotlight reels, and crowd energy clips for all EDC week events
